Pokémon GO Fest.title: GO Fest 2026 Sunday Raid Makeup

bonuses: Additional 1 Candy XL from completing 5-star and higher raids
Additional 3 Candy from completing 5-star and higher raids
Additional 5,000 XP from completed raids
Link Charge cap will increase to 2,000
Premier Balls will be more effective at catching Pokémon after raids
There will be no limit on Remote Raids for all Trainers from Saturday, July 25, at 1:00 p.m. PDT to Sunday, July 26, at 11:59 p.m. PDT
Up to twelve free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
UPDATE from Scopely:
As compensation for a technical issue that prevented some Trainers from joining Raid Battles during Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global, a special Sunday raid makeup event will be held on July 26, 2026 from 10 am to 7 pm local time.
Raid Bosses featured during the original Sunday of GO Fest 2026: Global—including Mega Mewtwo Y Super Mega Raids—will appear!

Event.title: Ozone Ascent
Event.description:
Complete Timed Research to encounter Rayquaza and more!
The Ozone Ascent event will take place from July 25, 2026 at 10 am to July 26, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition

bonuses: 10× XP for catching Pokémon.
2× Candy for catching Pokémon
6× XP for catching Pokémon.
8× XP for catching Pokémon.
First partner Pokémon may have a team-specific Special Background!*
GO Pass Deluxe: 3× Candy for catching Pokémon
Increased chance of receiving Candy XL from catching Pokémon

Event.description:
First partner and costumed Pokémon galore in Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition!
The Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition event will take place from July 21, 2026 at 10 am to July 27, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Fire and Ice Hatch Day

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance*
2× Candy from hatching Eggs*
Increased chance of hatching Shiny Smoochum and Shiny Magby
Increased chance of receiving 2 km Eggs from spinning PokéStops

Event.description:
Feeling the heat—and the chill? Fire and Ice Hatch Day features Smoochum and Magby hatching much more frequently from 2 km Eggs, with an increased chance of hatching Shiny Smoochum and Shiny Magby!
The Fire and Ice Hatch Day event will take place on August 8, 2026 from 11 am to 5 pm.

Event.title: Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
2× XP for spinning a PokéStop
GO Pass Deluxe: 1/4 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
GO Pass Deluxe: 3× XP for spinning a PokéStop

Event.description:
Fire up or chill out during Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers!
The Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers event will take place from August 4, 2026 at 10 am to August 10, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Ultra Unlock: Water Festival

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
2× Candy for catching Pokémon
2× XP for catching Pokémon.
3× Stardust for catching Pokémon.
3× XP for catching Pokémon.
4× Stardust for catching Pokémon.
4× XP for catching Pokémon.
5× Stardust for catching Pokémon.

Rainy Lure Modules will attract Arrokuda

Event.description:
Arrokuda and Cramorant splash into Pokémon GO during Ultra Unlock: Water Festival!
The Ultra Unlock: Water Festival event will take place from August 18, 2026 at 10 am to August 24, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

Event.title: Pokémon XP & 2026 Worlds
Event.description: The Pokémon XP & 2026 Worlds event will take place from August 25, 2026 at 10 am to August 30, 2026 at 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Feebas during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On July 27, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Feebas.
- Feebas

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from July 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Master Premier | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Master Premier will run from July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mythical and Legendary Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Fire-, Water-, Ice-, and Rock-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Pokémon that have evolved at least once and can evolve again will be eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Water-, Fighting-, and Dark-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Primarina

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition will run from September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 8, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Salamence in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Salamence will be in Mega Raids from July 22, 2026 at 6 am to July 28, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Solgaleo in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Solgaleo will be in five-star raid battles from July 22, 2026 to July 28, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- July 22

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Palkia in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Palkia will appear in Pokemon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Palkia!
Shadow Palkia will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from July 1 to August 4.

Raid Battles.title: Kyurem in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Kyurem from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- July 29

Raid Battles.title: Mega Aggron in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Aggron will be in Mega Raids from July 29, 2026 at 6 am to August 4, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Blaziken in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Blaziken will be in Mega Raids from August 5, 2026 at 6 am to August 11, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf will be in five-star raid battles from August 5, 2026 to August 11, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- August 5
As a reminder, these are the regions that Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf are available in:
Uxie is available in the Asia-Pacific region. Mesprit is available in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India. Azelf is available in the Americas and Greenland.

Raid Battles.description: Mega Garchomp will be in Mega Raids from August 12, 2026 at 6 am to August 18, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Swampert in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Swampert will be in Mega Raids from August 19, 2026 at 6 am to August 25, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Giratina (Altered Forme) in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Giratina (Altered Forme) will make its Shadow Raid debut in Pokémon GO! If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Giratina (Altered Forme)!
Shadow Giratina (Altered Forme) will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from August 5 to September 8.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Gyarados in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Gyarados will be in Mega Raids from August 26, 2026 at 6 am to September 8, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Regirock, Regice, and Registeel in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:

Raid Hour.title: Kyurem Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Kyurem is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description:
A Raid Hour featuring Uxie, Mesprit, and Azelf is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.
Each Lake Guardian appears in one region. They are as follows:
- Uxie: Asia-Pacific Region
- Mesprit: Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India
- Azelf: Americas and Greenland

Raid Hour.title: Groudon Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Groudon is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Lunala Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Lunala is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Regirock, Regice, and Registeel Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Regirock, Regice, and Registeel is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Regirock, Regice, and Registeel Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Regirock, Regice, and Registeel is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Bidoof Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Thursday.
July 30: The featured Pokémon is Bidoof and the special bonus is 2× Transfer Candy.

Max Battles.title: Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day

bonuses: 1/4 Adventuring distance to receive Max Particles*
2× Max Particles from exploring*
2× XP from Max Battles
8× Max Particles from Power Spots
Additional Power Spots will be active
All Power Spots will host Gigantamax Battles
From July 31 at 5:00 p.m. to August 1 at 8:00 p.m. PDT (GMT −7), the daily Remote Raid limit will increase from 10 to 20
Max Particle collection limit increased to 1,600
Power Spots will refresh more frequently
Up to three Special Trades for the day

Max Battles.description: The Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day event will take place on August 1, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm local time.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Fairy Trail
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Venom and Vines
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

GO Pass.description:
The Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration continues with GO Pass: July! Ho-Oh, Gimmighoul holding a 10th anniversary coin, and more await.
From Tuesday, July 7, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, August 4, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for July will be available in Pokémon GO!

The Lucky Trinket returns and Latias soars into GO Pass: August!
The GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for August will be available from August 4, 2026 at 10:00 am to September 8, 2026 at 10:00 am local time.

Season.title: Forever Forward

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Forever Forward!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
